send_to_cs: After ESC if the cx is impatient/persistent, use FUT shortcut
escalate: For damaged bras use WP shortcut and ESC
For damaged underwear use DUW shortcut and ESC
ESC if cx is asking for a manager and/or expecting a phone call from them
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
templates: For checkout issues for bundle items use CIB shortcut
dos_and_donts: If an item doesn't have a "notify me" feature on the product page, it won't be restocked
Help the cx in selecting the right size & offer to exchange if they're looking to return
Make sure to make recommendations based on accurate bra sizing options
🤖 Confirm cx issue before recommending esc or customer service
🤖 Do not recommend calling - currently don't have a phone number where cx can call us at
🤖 If a cx asks for a price, ask for the item and provide the answer. Don't let them find it on her own
promo_and_exclusions: Survey codes CAN be stacked with the bundle & save offer
Discount codes don't work on final sale items
Site-wide sales may apply only to select styles/shades - check the terms and conditions by clicking the (?) next to the promo banner at the top of the website
Welcome code is ONLY valid on first purchases, if this isn't the cx first order it won't work

Jaanuu: Your job isn't easy, so treat yourself to the most comfortable scrubs you've ever worn. Enter code MOBILE15 at checkout for 15% off your next purchase. Click here to shop now: https://jaanuu.attn.tv/az8qIuEPWLnE .
Why does mobile15 not work.
It says its been used but not by me
Jaanuu: I'm sorry you're having issues with the code. Can I please have a screenshot of your cart with the items you're trying to purchase and the gift card applied? I'd be happy to help!

Jaanuu: Thanks for sending that over! It looks like you had final sale items in your cart which are excluded from our promos. I understand that this can be quite a bummer but these items have the highest discount pre-applied so you already got the best deal! Feel free to use this code on your next purchase and keep an eye out for more promos in the future.

Hope this clarifies! Is there anything else I can help you with in the meantime?
Why doesn't it make that exclusion when they tell you about the discount code?
That's actually marketing fraud
Jaanuu: Thank you for sending this over. Thank you so much for your support. I'm really sorry that you were not able to use the code. Let me know if there's anything else I can help you with.
